name: CYCLOPS
description: Scott Summers leads the X-Men as Cyclops. Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he precisely controls the devastating force channeled through eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield. But when that visor comes off, all restraint disappears, erupting into an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy!
lore: A longtime leader of the X-Men, Scott Summers has the Mutant ability to release beams of pure concussive force from his eyes, requiring him to wear special ruby quartz lenses at all times to keep his power contained. Swept away to the year 2099 by the Timestream Entanglement, Cyclops ended up in Nueva York and was targeted by Alchemax. After his visor was damaged while protecting Moon Girl, who was accidentally caught in the conflict, Alchemax imprisoned Cyclops and used his Mutant ability to create a powerful new form of Chronovium.

abilities.name: Optic Blast
abilities.description: Fire a quick burst of kinetic force forward. Hitting enemies accelerates Ricochet Force charge rate

abilities.name: Concussive Beam
abilities.description: Continuously fire a powerful beam that can refract between enemies and the environment. Hitting enemies accelerates Ricochet Force charge rate

abilities.name: Ricochet Force
abilities.description: Fire a beam that can diffract and track nearby enemies after hitting terrain. Upon use, Cyclops gains Bonus Health

stats.Environment Refraction Damage Falloff Di: Falloff begins at 8m, decreasing to 40% at 12m
stats.Environment Refraction Damage Scaling pe: After the first refraction, each additional refraction increases damage by 10%, up to 20%
stats.Cooldown: 2 charges, with each charge taking 15s to recharge. Base Cooldown 2s

abilities.name: Propulsion Burst
abilities.description: Fire a propulsion beam to push yourself and the target backward, applying a Slow effect to the enemy

abilities.name: Optic Ascent
abilities.description: Fire a propulsion beam directly downward to push yourself up and knock back hit enemies, applying a Slow effect to them

abilities.name: Kinetic Hover
abilities.description: Enter a slow-fall state while firing Concussive Beam mid-air

abilities.name: Ruby Rage
abilities.description: Remove visor and fire a powerful sweeping beam forward. The blast leaves behind volatile excess energy that erupts, dealing massive secondary explosive damage

received.name: Red Adamantium
received.description: Cyclops supercharges Wolverine's claws, extending his attack range. While active, Wolverine's Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting him a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around him

base.description: Hitting an enemy with Ricochet Force summons the Phoenix Force to ignite them, causing continuous burn damage over a set duration. Hitting an ignited target with Optic Blast or Concussive Beam instantly triggers a percentage of the remaining burn damage as a single burst.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Phoenix, Spark detonations reduce the cooldown of Ricochet Force.

base.description: Release stored kinetic energy to enter an enhanced state for a duration. While active, Cyclops gains significantly increased movement speed and jump height.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Gambit, during the enhanced state, the attack speeds for both Optic Blast and Concussive Beam are increased.
